knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Keisuke when a restaurant chain is trapped by old systems/hardware; centralised HR data matters once outlets and business lines multiply.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Old system/hardware pain and manual admin made multi-location scheduling and HR data hard to manage.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: The public case page says StaffAny improved centralised HR data and automated scheduling.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: SG restaurant chains with old-system, hardware, leave, attendance, centralised data, or multi-business admin pain.
